health.summary: Core services healthy on the live VM (trader/web-api/telegram/claude-bridge all active; uptime 4.6h, heartbeat running, VM cpu 20%/mem 14%/disk 33%). IB gateway reachable — MES client connected, account_data_ready, breaker closed, not wedged. The one health flag is on the TRAINER: ict-trainer.service is inactive/disabled and 0 training cycles ran in 24h (dataset builds + DB sync are fine), so the model-promotion pipeline is starved.

flags.detail: ict-trainer.service disabled/inactive; cycles_24h=0. Datasets build (68 ok/24h) and the live->trainer DB sync is fresh (05:00), but no training cycles are converting them into promoted models.
bybit_portfolio (paper mirror) rejects sizing with gate_balance=0.00 -> its legs never size; portfolio-mirror P&L is understated/blank on that account.

performance.summary: Real-money losses are tiny in dollar terms (bybit_2 is barely sized) but the pattern is bad and the paper book — the fleet at real size — is where it shows. Every executed real loss this window is a low-confidence '*_pullback_2h' entry stopped or reconciler-closed: eth_pullback_2h ETH long -$4.04, ada_pullback_2h ADA long -$2.00, xrp_pullback_2h XRP long -$4.71; one trend_donchian BTC long +$0.50. The pullback_2h family (eth/xrp/ada/avax) is the bleeder, all conf 0.30-0.56, all entered in an ADX-'trending' tape that was actually reversing. ADX measures trend STRENGTH not DIRECTION, so a strong down-move reads as 'trending' and the long-biased pullback-buyers buy the falling knife.

flags.detail: *_pullback_2h (eth/xrp/ada/avax) is the consistent loser on both books; low confidence (0.30-0.56); direction-blind entries into declining alts.

Across all of 2026-07-16 the regime router fired exactly 1 hard-gate row and 0 shadow-gate rows — the policy table only covers the 6 original BTC strategies, so the ~38-strategy alt/equity/futures roster trades with no regime protection.

ml.summary: 83 models in the registry but only 1 at advisory (the sole stage that touches live orders); 28 shadow, 53 candidate. The setup-quality shadow models actively scored yesterday's losing setups NEGATIVE (setup-quality-lgbm-v2 -0.15 to -0.51) but are observe-only, so the system generated 'weak setup' signals and ignored them by design. Regime heads have soaked their time but promotion is blocked on the live_agreement gate (MB-20260626-003). Combined with the idle trainer service, the ML layer has near-zero live influence.

flags.detail: 1 advisory / 28 shadow / 53 candidate; shadow->advisory blocked on the live_agreement gate design (MB-20260626-003).
2 manifests failed in 24h (5m-flow VPIN head OOM pattern; TCN family empty-dataset skips) — recurring, tracked.

consolidated.headline: On REAL money yesterday (2026-07-16) was a -$5.54 day (3 closed, 1 win) — small, because bybit_2 is barely sized. The alarming red is on the PAPER book (the fleet at real size): -$1,485 (07-14), -$4,362 (07-15), then +$895 (07-16). The worst day was 07-15, not 07-16. Root cause of the bleed is structural, not a one-off: the losing trades are low-confidence '*_pullback_2h' longs entered because ADX read the tape as 'trending' — but ADX measures trend STRENGTH, not DIRECTION, so a hard sell-off looks identical to a rally. The regime router that is supposed to catch this covers only the 6 original BTC strategies; the ~38-strategy alt/equity/futures roster (every pullback_2h bleeder included) has no regime cells and trades permissive-ON. The one ML layer that flagged these setups as weak is shadow-only and ignored by design, and the trainer that would promote it is idle.

operator_priorities.title: Regime router governs only 6 of 44 live strategies — extend coverage or gate the pullback_2h family
operator_priorities.detail: config/regime_policy.yaml only names the original BTC set (trend_donchian, squeeze_breakout_4h, htf_pullback_trend_2h, fade_breakout_4h, fvg_range_15m, vwap). The 38 newer alt/equity/futures strategies — incl. every *_pullback_2h that bled this week — resolve to permissive-ON with zero regime protection. Confirmed live: only 1 hard-gate row fired across all of 2026-07-16. Author OFF/weight cells for the alt roster (backtest-gated) or demote the pullback_2h family to shadow.

operator_priorities.title: ADX regime is direction-blind — add a trend-DIRECTION filter
operator_priorities.detail: detect_regime() classifies chop/transitional/trending purely on ADX-14 magnitude. A strong DOWNtrend has high ADX too, so long-only pullback-buyers fire 'buy the dip' into a sell-off. Every executed real loss this window was a pullback-long stopped out in an ADX-'trending' but falling market. Add a directional gate (e.g. midline slope / DI+ vs DI- sign) so long pullbacks are suppressed when the trend is down.

operator_priorities.title: Re-enable the trainer training cycle
operator_priorities.detail: ict-trainer.service is inactive/disabled and 0 cycles ran in 24h. Dataset builds + DB sync work, but nothing promotes models — 1 advisory vs 28 shadow. The setup-quality models that would have down-weighted yesterday's setups are stranded at shadow. Re-enable the timer and unblock the shadow->advisory live_agreement gate (MB-20260626-003).

operator_priorities.title: Demote ada_pullback_2h (review the whole *_pullback_2h family)
operator_priorities.detail: ada_pullback_2h is the biggest loser on both books; the pullback_2h family is low-edge (conf 0.30-0.56) and direction-blind. Demote ada to shadow now; put eth/xrp/avax_pullback_2h on notice pending a direction-aware entry fix.

operator_priorities.title: Consider enabling FLIP_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD for genuine reversals
operator_priorities.detail: FLIP_POLICY=hold (correct for churn) refuses an opposing signal and rides the wrong-way position to its stop — exactly the failure mode in a real regime reversal. FLIP_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD (the override that lets a high-conviction opposing signal exit early) is 0.0 = disabled. Backtest a small positive threshold so a strong reversal can cut a losing hold.

cross_review_notes: ML x Performance: the shadow setup-quality models scored yesterday's losing setups negative (-0.15 to -0.51) but are observe-only; the signal that would have prevented the trades exists and is ignored by design. Unblocking promotion (health/ml) directly addresses the performance bleed.

Real vs Paper: real-money losses are single-digit dollars only because bybit_2 is minimally sized; the paper book (correctly sized mirror) shows the true fleet quality (-$5.8k over 07-14/07-15). The divergence is a sizing artifact, not a data error — judge strategy quality off paper.
Regime x Roster growth: the roster grew from ~6 to ~44 strategies but the regime policy table did not grow with it, so risk controls now cover a shrinking fraction of live exposure.

paper.note: 07-16 open-day was +$895 on paper. The two prior days were the real damage: -$1,485 (07-14), -$4,362 (07-15). Paper is the fleet at real size.

prop.note: prop journal not separately pulled this run (isolated from trades; no real-money impact).

ADX ~28.5 ('trending') at the pullback entries, but price fell into the stops — high ADX on a DOWN move. eth_pullback_2h long stopped -0.98R.
xrp_pullback_2h long hit SL for -1.00R; still one open real-money XRP long.

trade_dossiers.note: conf 0.52; ADX said trending, price fell to stop (-0.98R).
